goals: 1. Complete correct engine — fix all GAPs, all choices policy-driven
2. Full policy control — every rng decision routes through PolicyCallback
3. Decouple engine/game_loop/policy/search per docs/architecture-refactoring.md tasks A-E
4. Train model that plays reasonable 8-10 turn games with itself (no blunders)

awr_iteration_plan_20260418.panel_v6: ussr_only_v5, us_only_v5, v44, v55, v56, v54, v20 + heuristic. Distinct --model-names for specialists (naming collision in v5 fixed).
awr_iteration_plan_20260418.training: 60 epochs minimum (20 was too few — models peaked at epoch 5 due to cold-start). PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 to fix empty logs.
awr_iteration_plan_20260418.evaluation: After training: export to TorchScript, benchmark vs v56 + specialists (N=200/side). val_adv_card_acc alone is insufficient.
awr_iteration_plan_20260418.mini_ppo: After best arch identified via AWR+benchmark: 10-15 PPO iterations warm-started from best checkpoint.
awr_iteration_plan_20260418.dense_rewards: Design: r_shaped = delta_vp * alpha * anneal(step). Implement in collect_selfplay_rows_jsonl.cpp. StepTrace already has vp_before/vp_after.
awr_iteration_plan_20260418.format: Always Parquet (zstd). Never JSONL for large collections.

value_calibration_finding_20260418.by_stage: early Brier=0.050, mid=0.108, late=0.211 (late game worst)
value_calibration_finding_20260418.implication: Value head systematically overestimates win probability by ~12%. Compounds with ISMCTS determinization bias. All models show positive bias (v56=+0.054, v319=+0.116).

ismcts_investigation_closed.root_cause: Value-head bias under determinization. The NN value head was trained on true-hand observations; ISMCTS feeds it determinized states with sampled opponent hands. Budget sweep (n_sim 50→800 on AR1 divergence state) confirms mode-3 wins all budgets with no convergence to greedy's mode-0. Root value degrades monotonically (-0.12 → -0.19).
ismcts_investigation_closed.search_quality: ISMCTS vs greedy-self: 30-47% combined WR at budgets 50-800 rollouts (flat, post-UAF+Dirichlet fixes). Search is net-negative vs greedy because rollouts systematically over-prefer Space over Influence when opponent hand is sampled.
ismcts_investigation_closed.fix_required: Training-side: train value head on determinized observations so head calibrates to hallucinated-hand uncertainty. Or: MC rollouts with heuristic at leaves (structural fix for vs-heuristic only).
ismcts_investigation_closed.scope: Out of scope for search-only patch. Reopen when model trains with determinization-aware observations.

false_escalation_retracted_20260417: Earlier claim of 'engine-model mat1=53 vs mat2=74 shape mismatch' blocking divergence diagnostic was FALSE. Root cause: broken torch install + stale build in worktree agent-a724a2e0. Verified on main HEAD de43e27: kScalarDim=32 (unchanged), tscore.benchmark_batched runs cleanly on v55 and v319. Main has all needed bindings: ismcts_search_from_state, play_callback_matchup, play_traced_game_with_callback. Worktree d0fc62f bindings NOT needed. Proceeding with inline diagnostic.

critical_discovery_20260416.scoring_card_bug: ALL PPO models v55-v294 were degenerate. legal_cards() never enforced scoring-card-must-be-played rule. Models learned to hold scoring cards -> instant loss at end of turn. Fix: commit 5f8f4ea.
critical_discovery_20260416.concern_separation_regression: WIP commits (6902851..dc6d6aa) from Codex concern-separation removed DEFCON safety checks from decode_helpers.hpp. Models DEFCON-1'd themselves. v56 benchmark dropped from 45.1% to 6%. REVERTED: commit 90f663e.
critical_discovery_20260416.pre_sc_models_strong: Pre-sc models (v19-v61) remain legitimately strong. v56=45.1% combined at N=500 was best baseline pre-chain.

ismcts_root_causes.uaf_bug: cpp/tscore/ismcts.cpp RawBatchOutputs used raw float* without Tensor keepalive -> intermittent free(): invalid pointer at scale. Transplanted _storage Tensor pattern from mcts_batched.cpp. Commit de43e27.
ismcts_root_causes.dirichlet_leak: IsmctsConfig inherited dir_alpha=0.2 dir_epsilon=0.25 from MctsConfig default -> search noise during eval. Overrode IsmctsConfig default initializer to zero both. Commit de43e27.
ismcts_root_causes.state_distribution_mismatch: Post-fix, v84 mined positions agreement NN-vs-ISMCTS jumped 96% -> 100%. But paired greedy-vs-ISMCTS stayed at -21/50 net. ISMCTS underperforms greedy on in-game rollout states. Root cause: value-head bias under determinization — NOT fixable by search-side patches.

ppo_chain.restart_conditions: Only restart chain on explicit user request or after architecture/engine change requiring fresh run

gap_tracker: ALL DONE (GAP-001 through GAP-043). GAP-044/45/46 WONTFIX (promo cards).
pragmatic_heads: ALL DONE (phases 1-4). Star Wars card 103 deck-choice low priority.
jsd_probe: DONE — jsd_probe.py + probe set + train_ppo.py integration

concern_separation.issue: Decode-level DEFCON safety checks in decode_helpers.hpp are POLICY-LEVEL safety nets, not duplicated rule logic. They must be preserved. Only consolidate rule QUERIES (is_card_defcon_blocked, nato_prerequisite_met, is_trap_blocked) into rule_queries.hpp without removing decode fallbacks.
